activeRequest: Fix Firestore token expiry after long inactive session causing scheduler OTP polling 401 loops
blockers: Residual risk: symlink privileged branch remains skipped on non-elevated Windows test runs.
Residual risk: Firestore user block-state writes use full-document semantics and may overwrite non-block fields on populated users/{user_id} docs.
Residual release risk: non-fcntl scheduler leader override can re-enable multi-leader execution if APP_SCHEDULER_NO_FCNTL_ASSUME_LEADER is misconfigured across multiple nodes.
notes: 2026-05-14: Platform-infrastructure implemented token refresh on expired active user token in set_active_user to prevent long-idle Firestore 401 loops.
2026-05-14: Tester validation passed for query handler + token expiry adjacent tests (29 passed + 2 passed + 10 passed).
2026-05-14: QA decision is conditional pass with recommendation for guarded rollout monitoring and optional 24h idle soak check.

2026-05-10: API docs updated to note version presence for 200 and 503 /health responses.

2026-05-10: Post-fix verification passed for full pytest, CI-style pytest with coverage, bandit, and mypy.
2026-05-10: QA review returned pass for scoped fix with low residual risk note.
